result.stdout:
NugetVersion - v1.6.1.0
Usage:  [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                       Show help information.
  -b|--base <PATH>                   Base Path
  -n|--name <NAME>                   Package Name filter
  -o|--output <FILE>                 Send output to file
  -of|--output-format                File output format [json]
  -fw|--framework <TARGETFRAMEWORK>  Target framework filter
  -v|--version <VERSION>             Version filter
  -sv|--set-version <VERSION>        Update versions of query to new version.
                                     can also use latest to use the latest found
                                     version
  -srefs|--suppressrefs              Suppress Project References
  -supver|--suppress-version-checks  Suppress remote version checks
